title: 9 Effective Herbal Creams for Women Dealing with Hyperthyroidism
description: Glycyrrhiza glabra creams have been studied for their potential benefits in managing hyperthyroidism, a condition where the thyroid gland produces excess hormones. The creams contain compounds like glycyrrhizin, a saponin that may help block the conversion of T4 to T3, a hormone that contributes to hyperthyroidism symptoms. Glycyrrhizin also has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can reduce inflammation and oxidative stress associated with thyroid disorders. Additional...
